CustomField.formula: IF(ISNULL( Cost_Price__c ), "", "$" + IF(LEN(TEXT(FLOOR(Cost_Price__c))) > 3, LEFT(TEXT(FLOOR(Cost_Price__c)), LEN(TEXT(FLOOR(Cost_Price__c))) - 3) + "," + RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(Cost_Price__c)),3), TEXT(FLOOR(Cost_Price__c))) + "." + LPAD(TEXT((Cost_Price__c -FLOOR(Cost_Price__c))*100),2,"0"))
CustomField.label: Cost Price
